releaseNotes:
Infra 0.2.0 — July 2026

- Stage-gated event workflows: multi-stage event types (Warranty Claim, CAPA included) with gate decisions, a visual workflow builder in admin, and a printable document-style event record.
- Migration import v2: import document version history, entity links, per-type display IDs (e.g. SOP-2), event workflow history, and custom fields — a full change-control migration from a legacy QMS is now possible.
- Read-only API keys: Bearer keys for the dashboard, map, and export APIs so external AI tools can read the instance without a login.
- Content references: link records directly inside document text, see them under Linked Records, and get an automatic Document Impact Review suggested event when a referenced document is approved.
- AI instance profile export now embeds the Import Companion guide — one file to hand to an AI assistant.
- Protected effective-date corrections on document versions (SuperAdmin, audited).
